indicators.name: couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not designed for sleep and do not provide a suitable surface for lying down.

indicators.name: dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables are not designed for sleep and do not provide a suitable surface for lying down.

indicators.name: hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring is uncomfortable and noisy, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: high ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can make the space feel cold and isolated, which is not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and views, which are important for circadian rhythm and mood.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The presence of couches and dining tables, hard flooring, high ceilings, and lack of windows all contribute to an unsuitable environment for sleep. The score is low due to the absence of any sleep-friendly features.
